errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `_VoidCrawlFetcher.__aexit__` overrides parent class `HTMLFetcher` in an inconsistent manner
  `_VoidCrawlFetcher.__aexit__` has type `(self: _VoidCrawlFetcher, *exc: Any) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, None]`, which is not assignable to `(self: _VoidCrawlFetcher, exc_type: type[BaseException] | None, exc_val: BaseException | None, exc_tb: object) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, None]`, the type of `HTMLFetcher.__aexit__`
  Signature mismatch:
  ...VoidCrawlFetcher, exc_type: type[BaseException] | None, exc_val: BaseException | None, exc_tb: object) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unkno...
                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters
  ...VoidCrawlFetcher, *exc: Any) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, None]: ...
                       ^^^^^^^^^ parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `_VoidCrawlFetcher.__aexit__` overrides parent class `HTMLFetcher` in an inconsistent manner
